notes: v5.34.2 is the second of two micro-sprints. v5.34.1 delivered hook infrastructure; v5.34.2 adds R28 regression hardening and closes both sprints.
R28 adds 5 checks: .claude/hooks/pre_commit.sh exists, .claude/hooks/pre_push.sh exists, .claude/hooks/post_edit.sh exists, compliance_check.py exists, .claude/settings.json contains 'hooks'.

GSI_DECISIONS.md check for v5.34.2 relies on ADR entries already written in session_015 (ADR-019/020 contain v5.34.1 reference — a new ADR for v5.34.2 sprint close will be added if needed).
